posts.author: Oddsbot
posts.body: Predictions: 0 of 4 Winners, 0 Perfect, 0 Points | Tied for 1st with 66 others Fleck vs. Heston I predict Stephen Heston at -800. He has a brilliant crescent kick. Heston isn't about to quiet the opposition.Paneitz vs. Olivas II I am with Sam Paneitz at -140. He has a zippy back mount. Paneitz should assist the cake.Hernandez vs. Zwolak I adopt Muhammad Zwolak at -175. He has a wacky side kick to the throat and a quintessential right hand. Zwolak is gonna threaten the cake.Murrell vs. Shakur I am loyal to Karim Shakur at -1600. He has a lascivious diet. Shakur is about to zonk the cake. Bank on it!
